title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Speed, Unknown person #10, Okobore Town Villagers, Tama, Unknown person #11 as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I LOVE THE SORROW- FULL SCREAMS OF INFERIOR COMMONERS!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hope you haven't forgotten that you destroyed my home!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What's with all the commotion, holder!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yahoo!! C it's master speed's treasure ship of provisions!!! Today's food is here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's provisions from the paradise farm.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All of the food there is grown with pure, clear water...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ZORO!! You take care of the ones on that side!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kiku! I'm sorry, but... we're going to have to make this a steal and run.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm sure he'll get angry, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll be better than sending him flying away somewhere.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: BAKURA TOWN- NEAR THE MAIN GATE

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's dealing with a problem at the Plaza in the fourth district!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going to have to ask you to stop right there... basil Basil Hawkins!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're lucky that Wano is an isolated country where the news isn't reported...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He knows who we are, so I need to get rid of him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, now... I don't need all three of you to be my Hostages!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's go ahead and execute one of you right here and now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Woman!! You've been chosen. Come forward.

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 39 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
